temples.name: Sri Sita Ramachandra Swamy Temple

temples.name: Jogulamba Temple

temples.name: Gnana Saraswati Temple
temples.description: A famous Saraswati temple at Basar on the Godavari, especially known for Aksharabhyasam rituals.

temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.
